programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: In the backwoods of Louisiana, Jesse James Caston shoots his wife and her best friend, kicking off a bloody rampage that will endanger his own stepdaughters, and put the FBI to the test.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Gambino family soldier Roy DeMeo and his crew were suspected of killing dozens of people and dismembering their bodies, but the FBI and other mobsters were soon on his trail.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: Scarface: The Al Capone Story
programme.desc: In the Roaring Twenties, Al Capone ruled an empire of crime in the Windy City: gambling, prostitution, bootlegging, bribery, narcotics trafficking, robbery, protection rackets, and murder. It seemed that law enforcement couldnt touch him, until one fatal night in 1929.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: Discussing the remarkable tale of how the CIA tried to kill Fidel Castro by turning his 19-year-old lover into an assassin.

programme.title: CIA Declassified
programme.desc: In 1985, CIA director William Casey allegedly ordered the killing of a Lebanese cleric who he thought was the head of militant group Hezbollah.

programme.title: Who Killed JFK? The Conspiracies
programme.desc: John Fitzgerald Kennedys assassination is a memory etched onto the minds of most Americans. An exploration of the many theories that have arisen and sought to explain why the president was assassinated.

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Delving deep into the lives of Brian Thompson and Luigi Mangione, exploring their contrasting backgrounds, the events that drew them into each others orbit, and the shocking manifesto Mangione released that sent the internet into chaos.

programme.title: The Boneyard
programme.desc: Chilling documentary charting a brutal real life tale of kidnapping, enslavement and murder. Find out how investigators tracked down a malicious murderer and explore the extensive trial that followed.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings of Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Looking into the different theories about who was behind the brutal Whitechapel killings that rocked East London in 1888.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the US bank heist in 1997 in which two armed men opened fire on staff and police officers at close range.

programme.title: Who Killed Lt. Van Dorn?
programme.desc: The wife of the late Lt Wes Van Dorn seeks an explanation of her husbands death after the helicopter he was piloting crashes off the coast of Virginia.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: Out of Mind, Out of Sight
programme.desc: Filmmaker John Kastner spends 18 months filming the daily lives of four patients in the Brockville Mental Health Centre in Ontario.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Exploring Hindleys childhood and the start of her relationship with Brady.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The stories of the victims and those who got away.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and crimes of infamous killer Myra Hindley. This film explores the stories of Brady and Hindleys five known murder victims and the accounts of the children who got away, most notably David Smith.

programme.title: Manson
programme.desc: A chronicle of Charles Mansons life leading up to the orchestration of the Tate an LaBianca murders.

programme.title: Mansons Missing Victims
programme.desc: Stories about people who disappeared when they attempted to leave the Barker Ranch.

programme.title: The Unsolved Killings of Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Looking into the different theories about who was behind the brutal Whitechapel killings that rocked East London in 1888.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the US bank heist in 1997 in which two armed men opened fire on staff and police officers at close range.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Adventure Earth: The Land Of Dams
programme.desc: North Rhine-Westphalia has many reservoirs that support wildlife and balance nature with development.

programme.title: Little Killers
programme.desc: Meerkats hunt cooperatively in the Kalahari, with digging skills, compared to other small animal hunters.

programme.title: Animal Homes
programme.desc: Animals make use of brilliant and extraordinary specialist building skills to construct the perfect home.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.sub-title: In the Grip of the Ocean
programme.desc: The reef life, and the birds, lizards and reptiles that cope with the lava rock islands of the Galapagos, make this remote series of islands a unique natural habitat.

programme.title: Wild Galapagos
programme.desc: The Galapagos Islands are home to animals that have made adaptations, including penguins, iguanas, tortoises, cormorants and - possibly the oddest - the vampire finch.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species - polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) - that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face.

programme.title: In the Land of the Moose
programme.desc: At the end of the summer, a moose finds herself alone in the forest. She has just lost her calf, probably to a bear. Now she must find a mate. Once pregnant again, she will endure months of bone-chilling winter until she delivers in the spring.

programme.title: Eagles - kings of the skies
programme.desc: In southern Alaska, bald eagles flock by the thousands in autumn for the last salmon migration of the year and to prepare their young for the harsh winter. In the Dolomites, a look at a couple of golden eagles and their offspring.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Animal Armoury
programme.desc: Colouring that matches or blends with their surroundings helps the Arctic fox, green tree frog and penguin hide from predators.

programme.title: Animal Armoury
programme.desc: Many animals such as toads, moths, snakes and spiders have poison glands, while the spines of the stone fish and the scorpion fish are poisonous.

programme.title: Alpine Whistleblowers - On the Playground of the Marmots
programme.desc: These peculiar and roughly rabbit-sized rodents enjoy great popularity at the GroSSglockner in the Austrian Alps. Before the last ice age, marmots used to live in the lowland of Tirol, but with the melting of the glaciers they were driven higher up into the mountains - a trend that will continue given the current climate change.

programme.title: Home of the Seals: on Brittanys Wild
programme.desc: Some have called the coast of Brittany the Riviera of the North; the many coves with white sandy beaches appear to be idyllic, but the Atlantic in the northwest of France is rarely calm.

programme.title: Mantises: Living With Cannibals
programme.desc: Stealthy mantis hunts in Kaiserstuhl vineyards; mating season brings deadly survival challenges.

programme.title: Predators of a Different Kind: In the World of the Unknown Sharks
programme.desc: With the aid of modern technology, revealing the unknown behaviour of some unusual species of shark: lemon sharks and their white-tip reef counterparts. The journey starts off in the turquoise-blue waters of the Grand Bahama Bank.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The introduction of seven Slovenian bears, two males and five females, into the woods of Adamello, in Trentino.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears
programme.desc: Looking glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.title: Lions: Africas Super Power
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, theyll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory.

programme.title: Myths of the Congo
programme.desc: The Congo River, Africas second largest, grows from Zambia, gaining strength as it flows westward.

programme.title: Life in the Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: From majestic lions and soaring peregrines to mysterious manta rays and gentle manatees, explore a world brimming with extraordinary species.

programme.desc: From majestic lions and soaring peregrines to mysterious manta rays and gentle manatees, explore a world brimming with extraordinary species.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina gets bitten by the keep fit bug and buys some vintage weights while Charles purchases an unusual artefact, a Victorian skirt lifter, but only after a demonstration from a blushing dealer. A short detour allows Christina to learn about a thousand year old custom in the village of Ripon.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Soft toy restorers Julie Tatchell and Amanda Middleditch are entrusted to revive a worn-out rabbit belonging to Liz Warne. As a baby Liz suffered from a lung condition which left doctors telling her parents she wouldnt survive. Hospitalised for a long time, they could only give little Liz a gift that could be sterilised. Bundo quickly became a lifeline for Liz, one that she has clung to ever since. Now completely threadbare, shes determined to make him robust enough to face the future.

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: The first story, featuring Jean Smith looking for her American Air Force father, has never been shown before, as the search process did not go as planned. In the second story, revisiting Annie Sims, who was searching for her birth mother and sister.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Actor Nigel Havers is usually cast in upper class roles, but his roots turn out to be very different. Following his mothers line, Nigel travels to rural Cornwall to discover a tale of illegitimacy worthy of a period drama. On his fathers side Nigel finds himself in Colchester as he discovers a tale of the Victorian equivalent of an Essex cab driver made good, who ends up losing everything.

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Cathing up with three searchers navigating new relationships and complicated feelings - ex-Premiership footballer Dominic Matteo was desperate to find his birth mother. Grant Williams returns to Derry in Northern Ireland to spend more time with his daughter Wendy OHagan. Finally, Colin Deering - who first met his brother Bryan back in 2014 - starts out on a whole new journey to find out about his birth father, but it has consequences no-one could ever imagine.

programme.desc: David Hockneys 1972 `Portrait of an Artist is a modern masterpiece and now it is up for sale at Christies in New York with an estimate of around $80 million.

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: A celebrated work by painter Le Corbusier is amongst a whole host of Old Masters and modern British and Irish paintings up for auction at Bonhams.

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Married to English actor Laurence Olivier, the actress Vivien Leigh had star quality and Sothebys are hoping her name will attract a number of bidders to a two-day sale of her possessions.

programme.title: Cirque du Soleil: Volta
programme.desc: A story about the freedom to choose and the thrill of blazing ones own trail, inspired by the culture of action sports.

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: The annual Weymouth Kite Festival provides movement and colour for todays three artists to capture.

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: The annual Weymouth Kite Festival provides movement and colour for todays three artists to capture.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A young woman is desperate to escape the man who seems to be stalking her. Scared and alone, she finds refuge with an elderly lady, but she soon begins to wonder whether she was safer on the streets.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Orderly World of Mr Appleby
programme.desc: A new bride plans to outwit her husband when she learns his sinister secret.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A brother and sister (Hume Cronyn, Carmen Mathews) scheme to defraud an insurance company. With James Gleason.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man (Hurd Hatfield) assumes another identity to kill his aunt (Mildred Dunnock) but forgets one important detail.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood filmmaker, famous for directing films such as the Academy Award-nominated Blossoms in the Dust and Thirty Seconds Over Tokyo.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A glimpse into the life of French star and winner of the 2019 Honorary Palme dOr, Alain Delon.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An ingenious plan to get rid of a gluttonous woman goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An adulterous orchid lover cares more for his flowers than his wife. When presented with a job in America, he thinks it the ideal opportunity to get rid of her through dastardly means.

programme.title: Laurie Lee: The Lost Interview
programme.desc: This evocative and unique film features the only TV interview ever given by Laurie Lee, including the amazing story of how it was secured by local TV producer David Parker.

programme.title: The Art Mysteries
programme.desc: Art critic Waldemar Januszczak sets out to uncover the secret meanings hidden in famous paintings, exploring the fascinating history behind works like the Mona Lisa and the Birth of Venus.

programme.title: Marcel Duchamp: Art of the Possible
programme.desc: Film exploring one of the 20th centurys most influential modernists and how his revolutionary ideas and philosophies changed the way we look at art and culture today.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life of the Academy Award-winning director whose work includes Terms of Endearment and multi Emmy Award-winning sitcom The Simpsons.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life of Academy Award-winning Maggie Smith. From `Harry Potter to `Downton Abbey, her huge portfolio makes her one of the UKs most recognisable actresses.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: An amiable swindler gets more than he bargained for when he buys a painting from a sweet old lady. Can she really be as naïve about the pictures worth as she seems?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two men are locked in a room together, and one is shot, but there is no sign of a gun.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man (Robert H. Harris) is overjoyed to learn that his long-forsaken love (Jessica Tandy) has searched him out to marry him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A murderer (Lee Philips) searches for an alibi after he kills a rival gangster (Chick Chandler) in a fit of rage.

programme.title: The Michelangelo Code: Secrets of the Sistine Chapel
programme.desc: Art critic Waldemar Januszcak tries to prove that Michelangelos work at the Sistine Chapel contains a veiled meaning.

programme.title: Gene Kelly: An American in Hollywood
programme.desc: From his beginnings in cabarets and on Broadway to his recognition as a choreographer and director, the good-looking star with a charming smile expanded the boundaries of dance expression.

programme.title: Accelerate or Die
programme.desc: Jake Chapman explores a mind-bending vision of the world that few can see, as he asks whether capitalism and technology are already one and the same, accelerating towards an inevitable climax.

programme.title: Blind Eye Artist
programme.desc: After an accident leaves Justin Wadlington blind in his left eye at age 5, he develops a unique artistic ability with no formal art training. Despite growing up without parents, Wadlington begins a journey of ascension to the fine art world.

programme.title: The World In A Painting: Ingres Diamond
The World In A Painting: Ingres Diamond
William Tell
programme.desc: In 14th Century Switzerland, a once peaceful hunter leads his people in rebellion after his family and country are threatened by a tyrannical Austrian King. As the Holy Roman Empire crumbles, the quiet lives of the Swiss peasants are upended.

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: After the triumph of the machines on Judgement Day and with killer robots hunting down the last vestiges of humanity, resistance fighter John Connor battles back. However, the arrival of a mysterious stranger threatens to tip the balance in favour of the machines.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: An honest Hong Kong cop protecting a Triad bosss girlfriend-turned-informer, finds himself framed for the murder of a dirty cop and going on the run. The movie mixes slapstick with wild stunts and features some painful outtakes during the final credits.

programme.title: Wrath of the Titans
programme.desc: Perseus enlists the aid of Queen Andromeda, Hephaestus and Poseidons son to rescue Zeus from the underworld, defeat the Titans and save mankind.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Professor Henry Jones is given a coded message during the Cold War which leads him to Peru in search of a legendary skull. Jones needs to deliver the skull to its rightful place, but Soviet agents who are trailing Jones have other plans which will endanger the West if the artefact falls into their hands.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers, young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker finds a clue that might help him understand why his parents disappeared when he was young. His path puts him on a collision course with Dr. Curt Connors, his fathers former partner.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: The emergence of a powerful new villain and the return of an old friend bring Peter Parker to the realization that all his enemies have one thing in common: Oscorp. Based on Marvel Comics characters.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee the Autobot finds refuge in a junkyard in a small California beach town. When 17-year-old Charlie revives him, she quickly learns that this is no ordinary yellow Volkswagen.

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
programme.desc: Batman and Robin have their hands full when Penguin, The Joker, Riddler and Catwoman join forces.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Fireheart
programme.desc: In New York City in 1932, women are not allowed to be firefighters. When the citys firemen disappear in mysterious fires, Georgia Nolan sees a golden opportunity. She disguises herself as Joe and joins a team of improvised firemen.

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A snail gets the chance to escape his slow-paced life and race in the Indianapolis 500 when a freak accident gives him the power of superspeed.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: Tim Burtons Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a retired widower in his 70s becomes senior intern at a fashion based e-commerce company. Jules Ostin, the founder, while first hesitant, soon learns to respect and even like her new intern despite their age difference.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: A disgraced male model becomes the unwitting fall guy in an evil designers plot to assassinate a world leader.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Teddy bear Ted seeks legal help from a young lawyer and a legendary, civil-rights attorney when the law declares him to be property and not a person.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Jackass 3
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and the gang unleash their most insane stunts yet, from roller-skating with a buffalo herd, to playing tennis with a beehive.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobsters beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Bucks brothers three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: Elizabeth might have her royal rival Mary Queen of Scots in custody, but a far greater threat lies to the east: the Spanish Armada. Despite her reign of 30 years, Elizabeths hold on the English throne remains uncertain. Her kingdom lies in the shadow of mighty Spain, Philip IIs vast army and the Inquisition, but Elizabeth is undaunted.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: Cookster: The Darkest Days
programme.desc: A dyslexic teen misunderstood by his family and desperate for respect, becomes a drug dealer struggling with addiction and debt while a rival threatens to destroy his world, driving him apart from the woman he loves.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: A soldier returns from Vietnam to find his boyhood friend, also a fellow soldier, in a military hospital, having suffered a mental breakdown in which he has become detached from reality and imagines that he is a bird.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: Paul Blart desperately wants to become a cop, but he is too fat to pass the physical exam. He instead works as a security guard in a shopping mall. One day criminals put the mall under siege, and Blart takes it upon himself to save the day.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: The Borrowers
programme.desc: Based on the Mary Norton novels about a four-inch-tall family who live beneath the floorboards of a human house. The familys future is threatened when the house falls into the hands of an evil lawyer who plans to destroy it.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Papa and the rest of the Smurfs reunite with their human friends to rescue Smurfette from the clutches of evil wizard Gargamel.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: SpongeBob goes on a quest to discover a stolen recipe that takes him to our world, where he tangles with a pirate.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: Blueback
programme.desc: After Dora suffers a stroke, her adult daughter, Abby returns to her coastal Australian hometown to help with her recovery. To try to coax Dora out of her nonverbal state, Abby tells her stories from her childhood, recalling Doras activism.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from `Mamma Mia! to `Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Rumble in the Bronx
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop on holiday in New York puts his martial arts skills to good use when he helps out a friend whose shop is targeted by a vicious street gang. Martial arts hero Jackie Chan, as always, does all his own stunts.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Epic tale in which an intrepid archaeologist tries to beat a band of Nazis to a unique religious relic which is central to their plans for world domination. Battling against a snake phobia and a vengeful ex-girlfriend, Indiana Jones is in constant peril, making hairs-breadth escapes at every turn in this celebration of the innocent adventure movies of an earlier era.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Adventure sequel. Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones, on the trail of fortune and glory in Old Shanghai, is ricocheted into a dangerous adventure in India. With his faithful companion Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott, Indie goes in search of the magical Sankara stone, and uncovers an ancient evil which threatens all who come into contact with it.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The intrepid explorer Indiana Jones sets out to rescue his father, a medievalist who has vanished while searching for the Holy Grail. Following clues in the old mans notebook, Indy arrives in Venice, where he enlists the help of a beautiful academic, but they are not the only ones who are on the trail, and some sinister old enemies soon come out of the woodwork.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Blade Runner
programme.desc: An ex-cop sets out on the trail of androids who have mutinied in a bid to extend their limited lifespan and fled back to Earth.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Futuristic drama set in the year 2019. A ruthless TV host faces a problem: his gladiatorial show, in which convicts bid for their freedom against specially-trained assassins, is becoming too one-sided.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Bug-eyed martians in flying saucers descend on unsuspecting Planet Earth to wreak untold havoc, as they kidnap a chat-show host and a scientist for evil experiments and blow up famous monuments around the world. Who can protect our defenceless world from raygun-toting aliens?

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: Geeky high schooler Napoleon fancies quiet Deb but cant ask her to the prom. His brother Kip has an online relationship and dreams of being a cage fighter, while his uncle Rico is more interested in his mail-order time-travel machine. Napoleons mission is to help his friend Pedro win the student presidency from the nasty Summer.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Reunited at a funeral, several college friends look back at how their lives have changed since the turbulent 1960s.

programme.title: It Takes Two
programme.desc: When a foster child meets the daughter of a bazillionaire, they hatch a plan to solve the problems in their life, and switch identities.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: A New York couple go to an orphanage to adopt a brother for their only son, but instead come away with a little mouse. On arrival at his new home, the diminutive rodent receives a lukewarm welcome by the boy - and an even frostier reception from the pet cat. Featuring a mixture of live action and animation.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the childrens story about the adventures of a small mouse, blending live action and computer-animated characters. The eponymous hero befriends a tiny bird wounded by a sinister falcon, but he must enlist the help of the dreaded family cat if he is to protect his new-found friend.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: A thirtysomething slacker attempts to inject some stability into his life by adopting an impressionable five-year-old.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: Tickety Toc

They are all so exhausted that they fall fast asleep, but with Chime Time imminent, they must find a way to wake up Puffertys wheels.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Hopparoo bursts all their bubbles with his sharp ears, the twins use McCoggins extra-strong bubble mixture instead and blow a bubble so huge that it engulfs Battersby, Madame Au Lait, McCoggins, Lopsiloo, Chikidee and finally Tommy and Tallulah themselves! Where is Hopparoo? Only his sharp ears can free them for Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah love dressing up and surprising each other with their crazy costumes, but when they decide to surprise everybody else in town too Hopparoo is not impressed. In their efforts to surprise the bunny, they give the Spring Chicks such a fright that they barricade themselves in front of the clockhouse, blocking the way to Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Madame Au Lait is teaching the twins pottery, and to inspire them she shows them a magnificent cow pot that she made on her wheel, but when she leaves them to their enthusiastic pot-making, they accidentally smash it and when they try to repair it, they only make things worse. Trying to re-create the pot is even more of a disaster. Huge quantities of clay fly from their wheel into the town, blocking Puffertys tracks.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Hopparoo is disappointed when everyone gathers for Measuring Time. He was sure hed grown more than that! Tommy and Tallulah have some crazy ideas about how to add inches, but a super-tall rabbit rampaging through town on stilts can only cause chaos.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are playing pirates. So they dont believe him when Chime Time really comes round.

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.desc: Venture along Earths coasts, where colliding worlds create a melting pot of biodiversity. Watch orcas hunt with precision, hold on as guillemot chicks take leaps of faith, crawl to safety with turtle hatchlings, and see crabs sculpt sandy galaxies.

programme.title: Africas Hunters
programme.desc: A younger and stronger leopard challenges Kamuti for her territory - the Luangwa Valley, where she has reigned for ten years.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: This wild dog has been on Australias shores for at least three and a half thousand years and is believed to be descended from the Asian wolf.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In South Africas Greater Kruger Park, lion cub Chiga has been born into a family of hunters, and now she must find her place in the pride.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Lizzie gets to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba some essential jaguar skills, including how to climb trees and hunt for dinner.

programme.title: Humanlike: The Chimps of Fongoli
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kante and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: When a trio of Elephants are orphaned in Zambia, they are rescued and transported to a purpose-build nursery. But it wont be smooth-sailing for the young Pachyderms; life lessons will be tough to imprint before they are returned to the wild.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: A two-year-old orangutan who was drugged and kept as an illegal pet by an oil sheik arrives at jungle school. Plus, angry male orangutan Jerry has gone missing and has not been seen for 18 days.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Cheetah cub Usana is born with the odds stacked against her, but she is lucky to have an amazing mother that will stop at nothing to keep her cubs safe.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: The lives of monkeys, chimps, orangutans and apes at Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre.

programme.title: Guardians of the Wild
programme.desc: Camp Phoenix in Zambias Kafue National Park is elephant heaven. Here a herd of orphan elephants are being given another chance. Their human carers teach them the skills theyll need to join an elephant herd in the wild.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: The orangutans seek shelter in the rainy season, and the staff help a lone baby sun bear threatened by rising flood waters. Beni receives a special medicine delivery from vet Arga. Plus: more nursery newbies arrive.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: The day-to-day lives and challenges of some of Indias most iconic species and creatures.

programme.title: Africas Hunters
programme.desc: As Zambias dry season progresses, the Nsefu lion pride take measures to protect their cubs from aggressive neighbours.

programme.title: Islands
programme.desc: New and Exclusive. Sri Lanka: Never-before-filmed highland leopards stalk Sambar deer, while territorial mudskippers and fiddler crabs compete for homes and mates. (6 of 6)

programme.desc: The flat savannas of the Colombian Llanos are governed by seasonal extremes that push life to the brink. In this unforgiving arena, there are no second chances, and only creatures best adapted to their brutal extremes will make it through a year.

programme.desc: Penny and Leonard host a cocktail party. Meanwhile, Howard receives a letter from his father, whom he hasnt heard from since he was 11.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Competition between the guys increases when a slot for a tenured professor opens up and they start to schmooze the tenure committee members that include Mrs. Davies from Human Resources.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his compulsive desire for closure after one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Leonard and Sheldon find out that Professor Proton, the host of a TV science show they watched as children, can be booked for private parties, they hire him to come to their flat and entertain them. Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog while he is away for the weekend, but the couple are thrown into a panic when the hound goes missing.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the girls trip to Vegas falls through, the guys invite them to a Dungeons and Dragons date night that results in Sheldon and Amys relationship taking an unexpected turn.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity that will keep him out of the country for several months. Penny does her best to support Leonards ambitions, whereas Sheldon is jealous of his friend and discourages him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raj pushes the boundaries of his relationship with Lucy, putting their romance in jeopardy.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Molly wants to save money for their wedding, but Mike is lured into buying Vinces 1957 Chevy Bel Air.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike finds himself caught in the middle when Molly argues with her family.

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike is scared when Mollys boss asks him to attend a party on Halloween, the one holiday he is afraid of.

programme.sub-title: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball With Zip

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Pineapple and the Bosom of Male Friendship
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis is discharged from hospital, but after returning home he unexpectedly ends his relationship with Meemaw.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Parasol and a Hell of an Arm
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meanwhile, Meemaw struggles after her break-up with Dr Sturgis.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond in Leonards absence, and Koothrapoli finds someone to share his heartache with. Elsewhere, while away at an out of town conference, Bernadette and Amy are hit on at the hotel bar.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons friendship is tested and Wolowitzs masculinity is threatened.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj designs a scavenger hunt that brings out the best -- and the worst -- in the whole gang.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After Sheldon and Amy watch an Indiana Jones movie together, she points out a plot flaw that ruins the movie for Sheldon who decides to plot some revenge. After Leonards mother publishes a book about his childhood problems, Leonard finds that he can manipulate Penny when she starts to feel sorry for him.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy takes a job at the same University as Sheldon which causes Sheldon to re-evaluate the time he spends with Amy. Howard has a fight with Bernadette and finds himself sleeping on his friends couch.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldons latest scientific breakthrough leaves him feeling like a fraud.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The Proton Displacement When Professor Proton contacts Leonard instead of Sheldon for help, Sheldon turns to another TV scientist, Bill Nye. Also, Raj gets jealous when Howard crashes a girls night.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard attempts to try and keep Sheldon from overreacting to a mistake, forcing Sheldon to make Leonard experience first hand what its like to be him. Elsewhere, Penny runs into Rajs ex-girlfriend Lucy.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small

programme.title: Howards Way

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Whos That Looking Sideways at Nelly?
programme.desc: Hobbo, former milkman and undercover agent at Primrose Dairies, is ready for any dangerous situation, and going round telling everyone that Nelly is his mother is one. Hobbo then discovers the danger of exercising when his neck locks solid while doing some simple head movements.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Nobody Messes With Tony the Throat
programme.desc: Howard is deeply concerned when Pearl starts going out every day with Nelly, and she will not say where. Hobbo comes to his aid, and heads a surveillance party to follow Pearl and Nelly. When the women go into a Hells Angels club, they decide not to be hasty, and confront them later.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: When Clegg and Truly tell Hobbo that local serial groom Norris Fairburn is free again, he decides that Norris would be an ideal husband for Stella. At the cafe, Ivy observes and listens as Hobbo, Alvin and Entwistle discuss their fool-proof scheme. Later, Ivy warns Stella about the plot to provide her with one house-trained potential husband.

Without the money to continue the extensive building work, and with the hotel still a distant dream, Alison and Mike decide to try to rent the place out for events.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Research into why and how large projects were built, the financial and social costs of their failure, and the consequences for the environment. Experts present plans to make something new from the ruins.

programme.desc: A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.

programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is in the steel city of Sheffield, where he discovers an enormous and beautifully preserved early 20th century steam engine. At 400 tons and packing 12,000 horsepower, it produced armour plate for the most feared warship of the Royal Navy.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Edwardian railway guide takes him to the city of Liverpool, where King Edward VII had recently laid the foundation stone for a grand Anglican cathedral at the top of St Jamess Mount. The young winner of a competition to design the building was a Roman Catholic from a family of architects. His name was Giles Gilbert Scott.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo braves the fastest zip line in the world, stretching 1,500 feet across a vast slate quarry. He uncovers a bitter industrial dispute between quarrymen and the owner of the pit, Lord Penrhyn, which divided the community at the beginning of the 20th century.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his early 20th century Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo embarks on a journey through Britains industrial heartland in the footsteps of King George V. He starts in Warrington and learns how the mayor, Dr George Joseph, received the royal party in the parlour of Warringtons magnificent town hall.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to Teesside to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van and an 80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave is on HQ duties and admires a Punto thats two decades old but has just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: Two spies turn double agents at the height of the Cold War standoff between East and West. Their deception happens as the superpowers edge towards nuclear war.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Portchester Castle in Hampshire on the south coast of England, where treasures include an extraordinary set of RAF medals awarded for extreme bravery to an airman who served in Dunkirk and the Battle of Britain. The team also admire some rare punk clothing by fashion designer Vivienne Westwood and a roll of ornate Arts and Crafts wallpaper destined for the bonfire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team visit the Ulster Folk Museum near Belfast, where treasures include stained glass, teacups from a luxury ocean liner and an unusual piece of medical history.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache. They also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a childs tricycle from the 1960s. Plus, catch up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: Two spies turn double agents at the height of the Cold War standoff between East and West. Their deception happens as the superpowers edge towards nuclear war.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and islands. Surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia, the Coral Triangle is one of the most beautiful corners of the oceans.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache. They also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a childs tricycle from the 1960s. Plus, catch up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop
programme.desc: Series about the dying art of repairing electronics, fronted by super-fixer Rob Howard, one of the UKs last remaining full-time repair men of retro-electronic products.

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop
programme.desc: Shamil and Rob head out to a vintage gaming emporium and they get their hands on a Commodore 64 and a Spectrum ZX.

programme.title: Masters of Reinvention
programme.sub-title: Luton Minor Model Plane and Armchair Drafting Table
programme.desc: Dr Shini and her dream team design and build a scale replica of an iconic vintage aeroplane, as well as an armchair drafting table.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Blackburn Michael catches a rare glimpse of Edwardian life on celluloid and marvels at how factory workers and schoolchildren alike were drawn to seek fame on film. Continuing east to Nelson, Michael braves the enemy camp to have a pint of tea with the socialist working classes in Britains last Clarion House. Way out of his comfort zone, he is heartened by their warm welcome.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Manchester at the magnificent Heaton Park, Michael discovers one of the first open air concerts was held here in 1909 by an opera fan, William Grimshaw, who entertained 40,000 people to the music of opera superstar, Enrico Caruso, on a gramophone.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael heads for Maltby, where he is caught up with the thrill of the chase as he investigates the high-octane sport of whippet racing. He learns how this `poor mans sport grew during the 19th century in the mining towns of the north and retains its appeal today.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches Birmingham and discovers how a radical reformer would make his mark on the city of a thousand trades. At Highbury Hall he finds Joseph Chamberlains splendid mansion home and hears how he established a political dynasty including a Prime Minister and a Foreign Secretary.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasnt seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rare Bond Bugs.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: With Gordievskys help, Britain identifies Mikhail Gorbachev as a possible new contender for Soviet leader. He could be the ticket to better relations between East and West. However, fragile steps towards diplomacy are threatened by vested interests.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at Woodhorn Museum in Northumberland, a former colliery, where treasures include a gold Rolex from the 1980s and FA Cup medals won by a Newcastle United legend.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to Ham House in Richmond, where jewellery specialist John Benjamin is amazed to see a necklace and bracelet found in a bag of compost bought at a garden centre in Germany. Mark Hill is intrigued by a chessboard artwork designed by film-maker Derek Jarman, decorated with pebbles and salvaged objects, while Hilary Kay reveals the secrets of a carved walnut shell that contains a miniature globe.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek encourages the team to buy a Francis Barnett Plover at auction. Plus, the wheels come off the restoration of an MG Metro.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: Derek thinks a 29,000-mile Ford Capri should be kept original. Plus, a Hercules womens racing bike from the 50s.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A cherished wartime iron workhorse needs to be hauled 160 miles from the Churnet Valley Railway in Staffordshire to a winter extravaganza in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: David Jasons Great British Inventions
programme.desc: Sir David Jason finds out about the Penny Farthing as he looks at the British inventors who played a vital part in the evolution of the wheel.

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop
programme.desc: Shamil picks up an iconic Weltron Space Helmet Radio in need of repair, but the spherical design proves a challenge to even get open.

programme.desc: The team reinvent a vintage DIY air raid shelter as a hi-tech garden shed. Plus, Jenny and Ellis work on a pedal-powered washing machine.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo is in the steel city of Sheffield, where he discovers an enormous and beautifully preserved early 20th century steam engine. At 400 tons and packing 12,000 horsepower, it produced armour plate for the most feared warship of the Royal Navy.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Edwardian railway guide takes him to the city of Liverpool, where King Edward VII had recently laid the foundation stone for a grand Anglican cathedral at the top of St Jamess Mount. The young winner of a competition to design the building was a Roman Catholic from a family of architects. His name was Giles Gilbert Scott.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo braves the fastest zip line in the world, stretching 1,500 feet across a vast slate quarry. He uncovers a bitter industrial dispute between quarrymen and the owner of the pit, Lord Penrhyn, which divided the community at the beginning of the 20th century.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his early 20th century Bradshaws Guide, Michael Portillo embarks on a journey through Britains industrial heartland in the footsteps of King George V. He starts in Warrington and learns how the mayor, Dr George Joseph, received the royal party in the parlour of Warringtons magnificent town hall.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to Teesside to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van and an 80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek travels to the Lancashire coast to pick up a rare 1972 Citroen SM, and Dave is on HQ duties and admires a Punto thats two decades old but has just 42 miles on the clock.

programme.title: Secrets and Spies: A Nuclear Game
programme.desc: Two spies turn double agents at the height of the Cold War standoff between East and West. Their deception happens as the superpowers edge towards nuclear war.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to Portchester Castle in Hampshire on the south coast of England, where treasures include an extraordinary set of RAF medals awarded for extreme bravery to an airman who served in Dunkirk and the Battle of Britain. The team also admire some rare punk clothing by fashion designer Vivienne Westwood and a roll of ornate Arts and Crafts wallpaper destined for the bonfire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team visit the Ulster Folk Museum near Belfast, where treasures include stained glass, teacups from a luxury ocean liner and an unusual piece of medical history.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache. They also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a childs tricycle from the 1960s. Plus, catch up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Retro Electro Workshop

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Blackburn Michael catches a rare glimpse of Edwardian life on celluloid and marvels at how factory workers and schoolchildren alike were drawn to seek fame on film. Continuing east to Nelson, Michael braves the enemy camp to have a pint of tea with the socialist working classes in Britains last Clarion House. Way out of his comfort zone, he is heartened by their warm welcome.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Manchester at the magnificent Heaton Park, Michael discovers one of the first open air concerts was held here in 1909 by an opera fan, William Grimshaw, who entertained 40,000 people to the music of opera superstar, Enrico Caruso, on a gramophone.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael heads for Maltby, where he is caught up with the thrill of the chase as he investigates the high-octane sport of whippet racing. He learns how this `poor mans sport grew during the 19th century in the mining towns of the north and retains its appeal today.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches Birmingham and discovers how a radical reformer would make his mark on the city of a thousand trades. programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are at Woodhorn Museum in Northumberland, a former colliery, where treasures include a gold Rolex from the 1980s and FA Cup medals won by a Newcastle United legend.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow returns to Ham House in Richmond, where jewellery specialist John Benjamin is amazed to see a necklace and bracelet found in a bag of compost bought at a garden centre in Germany.
